svg.title: Meridian app icon — arc ends at background edges
svg.desc: A dark rounded square app icon where the arc path ends exactly at the background edges.

circle.style: stroke: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 1; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto; fill: rgb(22, 127, 249);

fill: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 2px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 1; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto; stroke: rgb(29, 138, 250); stroke-opacity: 0.54;

stroke: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 0.85; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto; fill: rgb(60, 125, 251);

stroke: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 0.85; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto; fill: rgb(60, 125, 251);

ellipse.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 4.44444px; stroke: url("#gradient-0"); clip-path: url("#clip-1");

path.style: fill: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 1; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 4.444px;

circle.style: stroke: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 0.85; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto; fill: rgb(60, 125, 251);

stroke: none; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 0.85; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto; fill: rgb(60, 125, 251);
